input.social: lots of friends visiting Milan asking me where to go
input.hobbies: trying new restaurants, thrifting, film photography
input.passions: finding hidden spots in my city and slow mornings

raw_text:
{
  "summary": "You are the in-the-know Milan friend whose recommendations people save for their own trips. Your content is a curated guide to the city's hidden gems, blending aesthetic cafes, unique restaurants, and thrifted finds with a slow-living, film photography vibe.",
  "content_pillars": [
    "Curated Milan Guides",
    "Hidden Gem Discoveries",
    "Thrifted Outfit Finds",
    "Aesthetic Slow Mornings"
  ],
  "tone": "Warm, aesthetic, and like a trusted friend",
  "audience": "Locals and travelers who want to experience the authentic, curated side of Milan, beyond the typical guidebook spots.",
  "posting_cadence": "3-4 posts/week, mixing spontaneous finds with planned guides.",
  "sample_topics": [
    "A perfect slow morning in my neighborhood",
    "Three vintage stores you can't miss",
    "The best aperitivo spot nobody knows about",
    "POV: I'm your friend showing you Milan's secrets",
    "Unlocking a hidden courtyard I just found",
    "My go-to restaurant for a quiet dinner",
    "A film photo diary of my week in the city",
    "The coffee bar I go to on my day off"
  ],
  "rationale": "This lane turns your real life and passions—finding hidden spots for friends—into highly useful content that people will instinctively save for a future trip. Creating save-worthy guides is a powerful way to build an audience and signal value to the algorithm."
}

output.summary: You are the in-the-know Milan friend whose recommendations people save for their own trips. Your content is a curated guide to the city's hidden gems, blending aesthetic cafes, unique restaurants, and thrifted finds with a slow-living, film photography vibe.
